creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to joshruehlig from comment #1)

My poudriere build produced this error:

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
Error: Missing: %%DOCSDIR%%/ABOUT.txt
Error: Missing: %%DOCSDIR%%/COPYRIGHT.txt
Error: Missing: %%DOCSDIR%%/INSTALL.txt
Error: Missing: %%DOCSDIR%%/ISSUES.txt
Error: Missing: %%DOCSDIR%%/README.txt
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1
